raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch winſch to arrt
e darrihs/ tatzhu tew buhs
naht/ ka mehs tarwus Deewus
e gribbam gohdaht/ nedz to sel-
a Bildi/ ko tu darrijs effi/ pee-
hgt."
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad apſlaitahs Nebu-
dNezars/ un winna Gihmis
ppe negants prett Sadraku/
iesaku un AbedNegu/ un atbil-
ja/ un pawehleja/ ka bij to
epli feptinkahrt karstaku dar-
ht/neka zittkahrt darrihts tappe."
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch pawehleja teem
iprakeem Wihreem/ kas winna
arra-Spehka bija/ ka teem bij
Sadraku/ Mesaku nn AbedNe-
seet/un deggotcha Zepli mest."
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta tappe fchee Wihri
iftiti eekſch fanweim Mehte-
em/ Kurpehm/ Zeppurehin un
ftahni Drebbehin/ un deggo-
ha Zepli eemefti."
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu ta Kehnixa
Bahrs drihs btj jadarra/ un
s Zeplisfohti karsts bija/ tad
onaitaja tahs Leefmas tohs
Gihrus/ kas Sadraku/ Mesaku
n AbedNegu btj pazehluschi."
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee trihs Wihri Sa-
aks/ Mesaks un AbedNegus
kritte faistiti deggotcha Zepli."
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad iſtruhzinajahs tas
chninsch Nebukadnezars/ un
shlahs ahtri/ un fazztja us fa-
eem Runnas-Kungeem : Ne-
am mehs trihs Wihrus faisti-
s eekſch Ugguns mettutchi? tee"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wisch atbildeja un faz-
zija: Raugi/ es redsu ttchetruß
Wihrus wattā staigajam Uggu-
ni/ un tee irr bes wiffas Wai-
nas/ un ta zettorta Gihmis irr
tahds pats/ ka buhtu tas to
Deewu Dehls."
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad veegahje Nebukad-
Nezars pee ta deggoscha Zepta
Durwim/ atbildeja un fazzija:
Sadraks/ Mesaks un AbedNe-
gus/ juhs Kalpi ta wiffu-augsta-
ka Deewa/ iseite un nahzeet
schurp. Tad iggahje Sadraks/
Mesaks un AbedNegus no Ug-
guns Widdus."
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fapulzinajahs tee
Leel-Kungi/ Walditaji/ Sem-
mes-Sohti/un ta kehnixa Run-
nas-Kungi schohs Wihrus ap-
randſiht/ ka tas Ugguns winnu
Meefas ne btj pahrwarreje/ un
ka winnu Gatwas Matti ne bij
apfivillufchi/ un winnu Mehfeki
ne btja aifkahrti/ ka arrt ne kah-
da Deggunma Smarscha pee
teem tappe ta-ohsta."
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Nebukad-
Nezars/ un fazzija: Slawehts
lat irr tas Deews Sadraka/Me-
saka un AbedNegus/ kas fawn
Engeli fuhtijs/ un fawus Kal-
pus atpestijs/ kas us winnu pa-
tahwifchees/ un ta Kehnixa
Wahrdtu ne turreifschi/ un jawas
Meefas nodevutchi/ ne kahdu
Deewu"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
